Example_EN: Can you convince him to join our project team?
Example_CN: 你能说服他加入我们的项目组吗？

Example_EN: She baked chocolate cookies for the school fair.
Example_CN: 她为学校义卖会烤了巧克力曲奇。
MemoryTip: cookie 偏美式；英式常说 biscuit。

Example_EN: I learned basic cooking from my grandmother.
Example_CN: 我从祖母那里学会了基本烹饪。

Example_EN: Please cooperate with the police during the check.
Example_CN: 检查时请与警方配合。

Example_EN: The project needs close cooperation between two teams.
Example_CN: 这个项目需要两个团队密切合作。

Example_EN: Many students find it hard to cope with stress.
Example_CN: 许多学生觉得难以应对压力。

Example_EN: Please make a copy of this form for the teacher.
Example_CN: 请为老师复印一份这份表格。

Example_EN: Trust sits at the core of every good friendship.
Example_CN: 信任位于每段好友谊的核心。

Example_EN: We ate sweet corn with dinner last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚晚饭我们吃了甜玉米。
MemoryTip: corn：玉米（美）；英式也可指谷物。

Example_EN: She works in a large corporate office in London.
Example_CN: 她在伦敦一家大公司办公室工作。

Example_EN: Please spell your name correctly on the form.
Example_CN: 请在表格上正确拼写你的姓名。

Example_EN: They spent a weekend in a quiet country cottage.
Example_CN: 他们在安静的乡村小屋度周末。

Example_EN: This soft T-shirt is made of pure cotton.
Example_CN: 这件柔软 T 恤是纯棉做的。

Example_EN: She stayed home because of a bad cough.
Example_CN: 她因为严重咳嗽待在家里。
MemoryTip: cough：咳嗽；拼写与发音差距大。

Example_EN: The city council decided to build a new park.
Example_CN: 市政会决定建一座新公园。

Example_EN: Please count the books before you leave the room.
Example_CN: 离开房间前请数一下书。

Example_EN: Please wait at the counter for your coffee.
Example_CN: 请在柜台等你的咖啡。

Example_EN: They prefer living in the quiet countryside.
Example_CN: 他们更喜欢住在安静的乡村。

Example_EN: She lives in a small town in this county.
Example_CN: 她住在这个郡的一座小镇。

Example_EN: I need a couple of minutes to finish this email.
Example_CN: 我还需要几分钟写完这封邮件。

Example_EN: It takes courage to speak in front of strangers.
Example_CN: 在陌生人面前说话需要勇气。

Example_EN: We booked a tennis court for Saturday morning.
Example_CN: 我们订了周六上午的网球场。

Collocation: crack in the wall;crack a joke;crack open
Example_EN: There is a small crack in the kitchen window.
Example_CN: 厨房窗户有一条小裂缝。

Example_EN: She learned a traditional craft from her grandmother.
Example_CN: 她从祖母那里学会一门传统手艺。

Example_EN: His computer crashed before he saved the file.
Example_CN: 保存文件前电脑崩溃了。

Example_EN: That sounds like a crazy idea, but it might work.
Example_CN: 那听起来像疯狂点子，但或许行得通。

Example_EN: This painting is her latest artistic creation.
Example_CN: 这幅画是她最新的艺术作品。

Example_EN: She wrote a creative story for the school magazine.
Example_CN: 她为校刊写了一个很有创意的故事。

Example_EN: We saw a strange sea creature at the aquarium.
Example_CN: 我们在水族馆看见一种奇怪的海洋生物。

Example_EN: She paid for the laptop with a credit card.
Example_CN: 她用信用卡买了笔记本电脑。

Example_EN: The cabin crew helped passengers find their seats.
Example_CN: 机组人员帮乘客找座位。

Example_EN: The police arrived quickly at the crime scene.
Example_CN: 警方很快赶到犯罪现场。

Example_EN: He has no criminal record in this country.
Example_CN: 他在这个国家没有犯罪记录。

Example_EN: The team stayed calm during the sudden crisis.
Example_CN: 突发危机中团队保持冷静。
MemoryTip: crisis：关键而困难的转折时刻。

Example_EN: Cost was the main criterion for our decision.
Example_CN: 成本是我们决定的主要标准。

Example_EN: The film critic gave the movie five stars.
Example_CN: 影评人给这部电影打了五星。

Example_EN: She was critical of the new school rules.
Example_CN: 她对新校规持批评态度。

Example_EN: His plan received harsh criticism from the board.
Example_CN: 他的计划受到董事会严厉批评。

Example_EN: Do not criticise her work in front of others.
Example_CN: 不要当着别人的面批评她的工作。

Example_EN: Farmers grow different crops in different seasons.
Example_CN: 农民在不同季节种植不同庄稼。

Collocation: crowd of people;in a crowd;draw a crowd
Example_EN: A large crowd waited outside the concert hall.
Example_CN: 音乐会大厅外等着一大群人。

Example_EN: The train was too crowded for us to sit down.
Example_CN: 火车太挤，我们无法坐下。

Example_EN: Sleep plays a crucial role in student health.
Example_CN: 睡眠对学生健康起着关键作用。

Example_EN: It is cruel to laugh at other people's mistakes.
Example_CN: 嘲笑别人的错误是残忍的。

Collocation: crush a can;have a crush;crush of people
Example_EN: Please crush the empty cans before recycling.
Example_CN: 回收前请压扁空罐子。

Example_EN: We discussed cultural differences in English class.
Example_CN: 我们在英语课上讨论了文化差异。

Example_EN: Travel helps you learn about local culture.
Example_CN: 旅行帮你了解当地文化。
MemoryTip: culture：一个群体的生活方式与艺术。

Example_EN: Please put the plates back in the cupboard.
Example_CN: 请把盘子放回橱柜。

Collocation: cure a disease;find a cure;cure for
Example_EN: Doctors hope to find a cure for this illness.
Example_CN: 医生希望找到这种病的治疗方法。

Example_EN: Children are often curious about how things work.
Example_CN: 孩子常对事物如何运转感到好奇。

Collocation: curl your hair;curl up;curl of smoke
Example_EN: She likes to curl her hair before parties.
Example_CN: 派对前她喜欢卷头发。

Example_EN: The little girl has naturally curly brown hair.
Example_CN: 小女孩有天生的棕色卷发。

Example_EN: What is the current situation with the project?
Example_CN: 项目目前情况如何？

Example_EN: She is currently working as a school teacher.
Example_CN: 她目前在学校当老师。

Example_EN: Art is part of the school curriculum this year.
Example_CN: 美术是今年学校课程的一部分。

Collocation: draw the curtain;curtain call;behind the curtain
Example_EN: Please draw the curtain to keep out the sun.
Example_CN: 请拉上窗帘挡住阳光。

Example_EN: Drive slowly around the sharp curve ahead.
Example_CN: 前方急弯请慢行。

Example_EN: It is a local custom to remove shoes indoors.
Example_CN: 进屋脱鞋是当地习俗。

Example_EN: The shop always treats every customer kindly.
Example_CN: 这家店对每位顾客都很友善。

Example_EN: She cycles to work when the weather is good.
Example_CN: 天气好时她骑车上班。

Example_EN: The storm caused serious damage to the roof.
Example_CN: 风暴对屋顶造成严重损坏。

Example_EN: She trains hard to become a ballet dancer.
Example_CN: 她刻苦训练想成为芭蕾舞者。

Example_EN: Swimmers were in danger because of strong waves.
Example_CN: 浪大，游泳者处于危险中。

Example_EN: I did not dare to open the heavy wooden door.
Example_CN: 我不敢去开那扇沉重的木门。

Example_EN: We could see nothing in the total darkness.
Example_CN: 在完全的黑暗中我们什么也看不见。

Example_EN: Scientists collect data from many different tests.
Example_CN: 科学家从许多不同测试中收集数据。
MemoryTip: data：信息数据（常作复数概念）。

Example_EN: The library has a large online database of journals.
Example_CN: 图书馆有庞大的在线期刊数据库。

Example_EN: Birds began to sing at dawn in the garden.
Example_CN: 黎明时花园里鸟儿开始歌唱。

Collocation: meet a deadline;before the deadline;deadline for
Example_EN: Please finish the report before the Friday deadline.
Example_CN: 请在周五截止日期前完成报告。
MemoryTip: dead + line：不可越过的时间线。

Example_EN: Please speak louder; my grandfather is partly deaf.
Example_CN: 请大声点；我祖父有些耳聋。

Example_EN: How do you usually deal with difficult customers?
Example_CN: 你通常如何应对难缠的顾客？
MemoryTip: deal with：处理；make a deal：达成交易。

Example_EN: Dear friends, thank you for coming this evening.
Example_CN: 亲爱的朋友们，感谢今晚到来。

Example_EN: The death of the old tree made the children sad.
Example_CN: 老树死去让孩子们很难过。

Example_EN: Students had a lively debate about school uniforms.
Example_CN: 学生们就校服进行了热烈辩论。

Collocation: in debt;pay off a debt;national debt
Example_EN: He worked hard to pay off his student debt.
Example_CN: 他努力工作偿还学生债务。

Example_EN: She has lived in London for a decade now.
Example_CN: 她已经在伦敦住了十年。

Example_EN: Sugar can cause tooth decay in young children.
Example_CN: 糖会导致幼儿蛀牙。

Example_EN: Do not try to deceive your teacher about homework.
Example_CN: 不要试图在作业上欺骗老师。

Example_EN: Christmas falls in December every year.
Example_CN: 圣诞节每年都在十二月。

Example_EN: He found a decent job near the railway station.
Example_CN: 他在火车站附近找到一份像样的工作。

Example_EN: We must make a decision before Friday afternoon.
Example_CN: 我们必须在周五下午前做出决定。

Example_EN: The company declared that prices would not rise.
Example_CN: 公司宣布价格不会上涨。

Example_EN: There was a steep decline in sales last month.
Example_CN: 上个月销量大幅下降。

Example_EN: We will decorate the classroom for the party.
Example_CN: 我们将装饰教室准备派对。

Example_EN: They put up Christmas decorations in the hall.
Example_CN: 他们在大厅挂起圣诞装饰。

Example_EN: There was a decrease in traffic after the storm.
Example_CN: 风暴过后车流量减少了。

Example_EN: I am deeply sorry about the mistake I made.
Example_CN: 对我犯的错误我深感抱歉。

Collocation: suffer a defeat;defeat an enemy;narrow defeat
Example_EN: Our team suffered a narrow defeat last Saturday.
Example_CN: 我们队上周六以微弱差距落败。

Example_EN: She spoke in defence of her younger brother.
Example_CN: 她为弟弟辩护发言。

Example_EN: The army will defend the city against attack.
Example_CN: 军队将保卫城市抵御进攻。

Collocation: define a word;define as;hard to define
Example_EN: Can you define this word in simple English?
Example_CN: 你能用简单英语定义这个词吗？

Example_EN: We need a definite answer by tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 我们明天早上前需要明确答复。

Example_EN: I will definitely call you after the meeting.
Example_CN: 会后我一定会给你打电话。

Example_EN: Look up the definition of this word online.
Example_CN: 上网查一下这个词的定义。

Example_EN: She got a degree in history from Oxford.
Example_CN: 她从牛津获得历史学学位。

Example_EN: Please send the email without delay today.
Example_CN: 请今天立即发送邮件，不要拖延。

Example_EN: Be careful not to delete the wrong message.
Example_CN: 小心别删错消息。

Example_EN: It was a deliberate attempt to break the rules.
Example_CN: 那是故意试图违反规则。

Example_EN: He deliberately spoke slowly so we could follow.
Example_CN: 他故意说得慢，好让我们跟得上。

Example_EN: To my delight, the exam results were excellent.
Example_CN: 令我高兴的是，考试成绩很出色。
